title: Nether & End
description: This mods aims at making the end and nether habitable
body:
### ### IMPORTANT: PLEASE ONLY DOWNLOAD THE MOD FROM HERE OR CURSEFORGE. These are the only official versions that support me. Downloading from places such as 9minecraft isn't safe. Please stick to official sources!!! **Report Bugs [here](https://github.com/EnderBoy500/Issues/issues)** Nether & End official Trailer:
New Version Numbering Due to Mojang changing from 1.{major}.{minor}(or what ever) to {year}.{drop number} Nether & End numbering system has to change before it's too late. Current Numbering System 1.{minecraft update}.{mod update} (so 1.5 was 1.21.6-8 and 1.6 was 1.21.9-10, etc..) New numbering system(starting from 26.1): 1.{mod update}.{minor fix}-{minecraft version} so for 26.1: 1.8.0-26.1 NOTE:(This is just a plan and things are subject to change!)
Disable Elytra Gamerule (Removed 1.21.11+) - False by default - when true: breaks all elytras that enter the inventory - when false nothing changes - switching from true to false restores the elytra to its original state (if for example it had 200 durability left and it is set to true, the elytra will appear broken and becomes un-usable, when the gamerule is set back to false the elytra will return to 200 durability, becoming usable again).
FAQ - Q: Will it be availbe for forge / neoforge? - A: Forge: No Neoforge: Maybe - Q: Quilt? - A: Use the the **Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL)** - Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack. - A: Absolutely, you can include it in any modpack.
